name: Kc's Fruitcake Drops
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift flour, baking soda, salt, and cinnamon together.
2. Cream butter and sugar in a medium-sized bowl until fluffy. Beat in eggs and brandy.
3. Stir the flour mixture into the butter mixture, half at a time, blending well to make a soft dough. Add the remaining ingredients, mixing until everything is well coated.
4. Drop batter by rounded teaspoonfuls onto a lightly greased cookie sheet, spacing them about 1 inch apart.
5. Bake at 350 degrees for 12 minutes or until firm and lightly browned.
6. Allow to cool completely before storing in an air-tight container. These cookies dry out quickly and become hard if not stored properly.
